coordinateNote: Viewer space: +X left, +Y superior, +Z anterior. The rod axis is the documented entry-to-exit trajectory used by the Phineas scene.

sources.label: Harlow 1848 case report
sources.role: historical case description and tamping iron dimensions

trajectory.assumption: Entry and exit are the scene-space control points from the Phineas narrative; the full rod is centered on their midpoint so both points lie on the generated rod axis.

ironRod.profileNote: Generated as a tapered cylinder using the documented shaft and tip diameters. The exact historical taper profile is not encoded in the local source set; the gate verifies length, major shaft diameter, tip diameter and trajectory alignment.

redistributionNote: The generated iron-rod mesh is project-created from documented historical dimensions. Skull and calvarium candidates keep their manifest license-status warning and require final attribution review before public redistribution.
